## Delete Customer Product List

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:delete-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-product-lists-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-list-id>`

Deletes a customer product list. This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/product-lists/{listId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The product list ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Delete Customer Product List Item

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:delete-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-product-lists-items-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-list-id-item-id>`

Removes an item from a customer product list. This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/product-lists/{listId}/items/{itemId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The product list ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Item Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the product list item to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. ## Get Basket

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-by-version-organization-id-basket-id>`

Gets a basket. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId} endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Payment Methods For Basket

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-payment-methods-by-version-organization-id-basket-id>`

Gets applicable payment methods for an existing basket considering the open payment amount only.
This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId}/payment-methods
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Shipping Methods For Shipment

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-shipments-shipping-methods-by-version-organization-id-basket-id-shipment-id>`

Gets the applicable shipping methods for a certain shipment of a basket. This operation makes an
HTTP GET request to the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId}/shipments/{shipmentId}/shipping-methods
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Shipment Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the shipment to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Order

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-checkout-shopper-orders-organizations-orders-by-version-organization-id-order-no>`

Gets information for an order. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/checkout/shopper-orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo} endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order No</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The order number of the order to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## Get Payment Methods For Order

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-checkout-shopper-orders-organizations-orders-payment-methods-by-version-organization-id-order-no>`

Gets the applicable payment methods for an existing order considering the open payment amount only.
This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/checkout/shopper-orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo}/payment-methods
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order No</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The order number of the order to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## Get Customer Address

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-addresses-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-address-name>`

Retrieves a customer''s address by address name. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/addresses/{addressName}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the address to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Customer Baskets

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-baskets-by-version-organization-id-customer-id>`

Gets the baskets of a customer. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/baskets
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Customer

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-by-version-organization-id-customer-id>`

Gets a customer with all existing addresses and payment instruments associated with the requested
customer. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. ## Get Customer Orders

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-orders-by-version-organization-id-customer-id>`

Returns a pageable list of all customer''s orders. The default page size is 10. This operation makes
an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/orders
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Cross Sites</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Cross Sites</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>from</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>from</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>until</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>until</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>status</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>status</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>offset</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum records to retrieve per request, not to exceed 50. Defaults to 10.</p></td><td><p>10</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. ## Get Customer Payment Instrument

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-payment-instruments-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-payment-instrument-id>`

Retrieves a customer''s payment instrument by its ID. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to
the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/payment-instruments/{paymentInstrumentId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Payment Instrument Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the payment instrument to be retrievedCustomer.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Customer Product Lists

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-product-lists-by-version-organization-id-customer-id>`

Returns all customer product lists. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/product-lists
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Customer Product List

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-product-lists-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-list-id>`

Returns a customer product list of the given customer and the items in the list. This operation
makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/product-lists/{listId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The product list ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. ## Get Customer Product List Item

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-product-lists-items-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-list-id-item-id>`

Returns an item of a customer product list and the actual product details like image, availability
and price. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/product-lists/{listId}/items/{itemId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The product list ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Item Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the product list item to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. ## Get Public Product Lists By Search Term

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-product-lists-by-version-organization-id>`

Retrieves all public product lists as defined by the given search term (for example, email OR first
name and last name). This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/product-lists endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>email</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The email address of the customer the product lists belong to.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>First Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The first name of the customer the product lists belong to.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Last Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The last name of the customer the product lists belong to.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Public Product List

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-product-lists-by-version-organization-id-list-id>`

Retrieves a public product list by ID and the items under that product list. This operation makes an
HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/product-lists/{listId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the list.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST

## Get Product List Item

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-product-lists-items-by-version-organization-id-list-id-item-id>`

Retrieves an item from a public product list and the actual product details like product, image,
availability and price. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/product-lists/{listId}/items/{itemId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the list.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Item Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the item.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. ## Get Promotions

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-pricing-shopper-promotions-organizations-promotions-by-version-organization-id>`

Returns an array of enabled promotions for a list of specified IDs. In the request URL, you can
specify up to 50 IDs. If you specify an ID that contains either parentheses or the separator
characters, you must URL encode these characters. Each request returns only enabled promotions as
the server does not consider promotion qualifiers or schedules. This operation makes an HTTP GET
request to the /pricing/shopper-promotions/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/promotions
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ids</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>locale</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
