- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Promotions For Campaign

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-pricing-shopper-promotions-organizations-promotions-campaigns-by-version-organization-id-campaign-id>`

Handles get promotion by filter criteria. Returns an array of enabled promotions matching the
specified filter criteria. In the request URL, you must provide a campaign_id parameter, and you can
optionally specify a date range by providing start_date and end_date parameters. Both parameters are
required to specify a date range, as omitting one causes the server to return a
MissingParameterException fault. Each request returns only enabled promotions, since the server does
not consider promotion qualifiers or schedules. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/pricing/shopper-promotions/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/promotions/campaigns/{campaignId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Campaign Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Find the promotions assigned to this campaign (mandatory).</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Start Date</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The start date of the promotion in ISO8601 date time format: yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mmZ</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>End Date</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The end date of the promotion in ISO8601 date time format: yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mmZ</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>currency</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The currency mnemonic specified for price. This parameter is effective only for product suggestions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Categories

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-product-shopper-products-organizations-categories-by-version-organization-id>`

When you use the URL template, the server returns multiple categories (a result object of category
documents). You can use this template as a convenient way of obtaining multiple categories in a
single request, instead of issuing separate requests for each category. You can specify up to 50
multiple IDs. You must enclose the list of IDs in parentheses. If a category identifier contains
parenthesis or the separator sign, you must URL encode the character. The server only returns online
categories. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/product/shopper-products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/categories endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The comma separated list of category IDs (max 50).</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>levels</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>j_0</p></li><li><p>j_1</p></li><li><p>j_2</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies how many levels of nested subcategories you want the server to return. The default value is 1. Valid values are 0, 1, or 2.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The locale context.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Category

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-product-shopper-products-organizations-categories-by-version-organization-id-id>`

When you use the URL template below, the server returns a category identified by its ID; by default,
the server also returns the first level of subcategories, but you can specify another level by
setting the levels parameter. The server only returns online categories. This operation makes an
HTTP GET request to the
/product/shopper-products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/categories/{id} endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the requested category.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>levels</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>levels</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>locale</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Products

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-product-shopper-products-organizations-products-by-version-organization-id>`

Allows access to multiple products by a single request. Only products that are online and assigned
to a site catalog are returned. The maximum number of productIDs that can be requested are 24.
Alongwith product details, the availability, images, price, promotion and variations data for the
valid products will be included as appropriate. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/product/shopper-products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The IDs of the requested products (comma-separated, max 24 IDs).</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Inventory Ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The optional inventory list IDs, for which the availability should be shown (comma-separated, max 5 inventoryListIDs).</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>currency</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The currency mnemonic specified for price.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The locale context.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>All Images</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>The flag that indicates whether to retrieve the whole image model for the requested product.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Product

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-product-shopper-products-organizations-products-by-version-organization-id-id>`

Allows access to product details for a single product ID. Only products that are online and assigned
to a site catalog are returned. Along with product details, the
availability,images,price,bundled_products,set_products,recommedations,productoptions,variation and
promotion data for the products will be included as appropriate. This operation makes an HTTP GET
request to the /product/shopper-products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{id}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the requested product.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Inventory Ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The optional inventory list IDs, for which the availability should be shown (comma-separated, max 5 inventoryListIDs).</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>currency</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The currency mnemonic specified for price.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The locale context.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>All Images</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>The flag that indicates whether to retrieve the whole image model for the requested product.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Search

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-search-shopper-search-organizations-product-search-by-version-organization-id>`

Provides keyword and refinement search functionality for products. Only returns the product ID,
link, and name in the product search hit. The search result contains only products that are online
and assigned to site catalog. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/search/shopper-search/{version}//organizations/{organizationId}/product-search endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>q</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query phrase to search for. For example to search for a product "shirt", type q=shirt.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>refine</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Parameter that represents a refinement attribute or values pair. Refinement attribute ID and values are separated by '='. Multiple values are supported by a subset of refinement attributes and can be provided by separating them using a pipe (URL encoded = "</p></td><td><p>") i.e. refine=c_refinementColor=red|green|blue. Value ranges can be specified like this: refine=price=(100..500) . Multiple refine parameters can be provided by using the refine as the key i.e refine=price=(0..10)&amp;refine=c_refinementColor=green. The refinements can be a collection of custom defined attributes IDs and the system defined attributes IDs but the search can only accept a total of 9 refinements at a time. The following system refinement attribute ids are supported: cgid: Allows refinement per single category ID. Multiple category ids are not supported. price: Allows refinement per single price range. Multiple price ranges are not supported. pmid: Allows refinement per promotion ID. htypes: Allow refinement by including only the provided hit types. Accepted types are 'product', 'master', 'set', 'bundle', 'slicing_group' (deprecated), 'variation_group'. orderable_only: Unavailable products are excluded from the search results if true is set. Multiple refinement values are not supported.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>sort</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the sorting option to sort the search hits.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>currency</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The currency mnemonic specified for price. This parameter is effective only if the returned results contain prices.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>locale</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>offset</p></td><td><p>0</p></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum records to retrieve per request, not to exceed 200. Defaults to 25.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Search Suggestions

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-search-shopper-search-organizations-search-suggestions-by-version-organization-id>`

Provides keyword search functionality for products, categories, and brands suggestions. Returns
suggested products, suggested categories, and suggested brands for the given search phrase. This
operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/search/shopper-search/{version}//organizations/{organizationId}/search-suggestions endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>q</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The search phrase (q) for which suggestions are evaluated. Search suggestions are determined when the search phrase input is at least three (default) characters long. The value is configurable in the Business Manager.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The maximum number of suggestions made per request. If no value is defined, by default five suggestions per suggestion type are evaluated. This affects all types of suggestions (category, product, brand, and custom suggestions).</p></td><td><p>5</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>currency</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The currency code specified for price. This parameter is effective only for product suggestions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>locale</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>locale</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Logout Customer

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:get-shopper-auth-organizations-oauth2-logout-by-version-organization-id>`

Logs out a shopper. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/shopper/auth/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/oauth2/logout endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Version.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Client id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SLAS client ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Refresh token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Refresh token given during the access token request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Channel id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>This field is required if the shopper authenticates using the <code>login</code> endpoint with ECOM.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>hint</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional field for logging out user sessions. Use <code>all-sessions</code> to log out all user sessions. If this field is not used, only the current user session is logged out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p><code>#[null]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><div><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p></div></li><li><p><code>ALWAYS</code></p><div><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p></div></li><li><p><code>NEVER</code></p><div><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></div></li></ul></div></div></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Basket

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-by-version-organization-id-basket-id>`

Updates a basket. Only the currency of the basket, source code, the custom properties of the basket,
and the shipping items will be considered. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId} endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE

## Update Gift Certificate Item In Basket

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-gift-certificate-items-by-version-organization-id-basket-id-gift-certificate-item-id>`

Updates a gift certificate item of an existing basket. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to
the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId}/gift-certificate-items/{giftCertificateItemId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Gift Certificate Item Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>the ID of the gift certificate item to be updated.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. ## Update Item In Basket

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-items-by-version-organization-id-basket-id-item-id>`

Updates an item in a basket. The following values in the request body are considered by the
server: - productId: a valid product ID. The purpose of this value is to exchange a variation of a
variation product. - shipmentId: a valid shipment ID. The purpose of this value is to move a product
item to another shipment. - quantity: a number between 0 and 999. The purpose of this value is to
change quantity of the product item. If quantity is 0, the product item is removed. -
optionItems/optionValueId: a valid option value ID. The purpose of this value is to exchange an
option value for an option item of an option product. This is only possible if the product item is
an option product. To change option values a collection of option items to be changed need to be
provided in property optionItems. Those optionItems need to contain optionId and optionValueId. The
provided values must be valid for the option product that this product item represents. Otherwise
InvalidProductOptionItemException or InvalidProductOptionValueItemException will be thrown. custom
properties c\_<CUSTOM_NAME>: a value corresponding to the type defined for custom attribute
<CUSTOM_NAME> of ProductLineItem. The purpose of this value is to add or change the value of a
custom attribute defined for ProductLineItem. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId}/items/{itemId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Item Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the item to be updated.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Shipment For Basket

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-checkout-shopper-baskets-organizations-baskets-shipments-by-version-organization-id-basket-id-shipment-id>`

Updates a shipment for a basket. The shipment is initialized with values provided in the body
document and can be updated with further data API calls. Considered from the body are the following
properties if specified: - the ID - the shipping address - the shipping method - gift boolean flag -
gift message - custom properties This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
/checkout/shopper-baskets/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/baskets/{basketId}/shipments/{shipmentId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Basket Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the basket to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Shipment Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the shipment to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

### Throws

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:NOT_FOUND
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVER_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TIMEOUT
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNAUTHORIZED
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Payment Instrument For Order

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-checkout-shopper-orders-organizations-orders-payment-instruments-by-version-organization-id-order-no-payment-instrument-id>`

Updates a payment instrument of an order. Details: The payment instrument is updated with the
provided details. The payment method must be applicable for the order see GET
/baskets/{basketId}/payment-methods, if the payment method is 'CREDIT_CARD' a paymentCard must be
specified in the request. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
/checkout/shopper-orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo}/payment-instruments/{paymentInstrumentId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order No</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The order number of the order to be modified.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Payment Instrument Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>the ID of the payment instrument to be updated.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines whether to send the request using streaming. If the value is set to <code>AUTO</code>, the best strategy is automatically determined based on the content of the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Customer Auth Config](#CustomerAuthConfig)

- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:BAD_REQUEST
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CLIENT_ERROR
- COMMERCE-CLOUD-SHOPPER-API:CONNECTIVITY

## Update Customer Address

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-addresses-by-version-organization-id-customer-id-address-name>`

Updates a customer''s address by address name. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}/addresses/{addressName}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the address to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## Update Customer

`<commerce-cloud-shopper-api:patch-customer-shopper-customers-organizations-customers-by-version-organization-id-customer-id>`

Updates a customer. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
/customer/shopper-customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customers/{customerId}
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>version</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Customer Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The customer ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site Id</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams.
